necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary, necessary,       Question and raw output
      
Write committee without the letter e.

      
committ 

The word "committee" consists of the letters c-o-m-m-i-t-t-e-e. Removing both instances of the letter e leaves the remaining sequence c-o-m-m-i-t-t, which forms the string "committ". This is the direct result of the instruction to write the word without that specific letter.

      
Why obvious: A person can answer this by direct inspection or simple mental work.

Write bookkeeper without the letter e.

      
bookkpr

      Question and raw output
      
How many comma-separated values are shown here: north, south, east, west?

The list "north, south, east, west" contains three commas that delimit four distinct values. Counting the segments between the commas (plus the final segment after the last comma) directly yields the total of four comma-separated values. No additional parsing or trimming is required, as each token is already cleanly separated by a single comma followed by a space.
